title: Creating a single list from multiple items in a group
excerpt: Apologies if this is a naive question as only been working with Mondays for a couple of days but is there a way of creating a single list of items from a group to send in an email to a team member? Thats without exportin…

posts.author: BarryT (Barry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apologies if this is a naive question as only been working with Mondays for a couple of days but is there a way of creating a single list of items from a group to send in an email to a team member? Thats without exporting to a third party like Excel?
I want to create a list of supplies needed for a job and send out to the person assigned?

Thanks in anticipation!
